case_title: MATEO, FLORDELINO T. vs. CASTILLO, ALEX et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATEO, FLORDELINO T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, ALEX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 CRESCENT AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES [CCP 415.46]
